creator: tj+freebsd_ports@a13.fr
text:
Created attachment 187378
update to 0.2.1

Sorry for the incorrect patch, I should get more sleep!

It was under my nose but for a moment I thought runtime dependencies
were dynamically listed from the gem specification itself. Worse, I
also managed to get them incorrect in the gem too, I just pushed a new
version.

The new patch is for an update to version 0.2.1, with RUN_DEPENDS
fixed.

Thank you for the earlier commits of the other updates I submitted!
